title: Positive Economic Data Pushes Metals Higher
section_path: Positive Economic Data Pushes Metals Higher
section_path_text: Positive Economic Data Pushes Metals Higher
summary:
Main
Investors were buoyed by positive economic data that raised the prospect of a global soft landing. However, the subsequent stronger USD created some headwinds for the commodity sector. By Daniel Hynes
Gold surged to a record high as the prospect of rate cuts from the Fed rose.
